summary: Native macOS menu bar prototype for system-wide gesture scrolling.
scope: Capture the Mac camera with AVFoundation and detect one-hand landmarks with Apple Vision.
Map left and right open-palm swipes to page scrolling in the frontmost app.
Map stable thumb-index pinch dragging to continuous system scrolling without moving the cursor.
Provide permission status, sensitivity controls, debug preview, packaging, and ad-hoc signing.
validation: release .app build and ad-hoc codesign verification
notes: Real camera, Accessibility permission, gesture direction, and cross-app behavior still require user acceptance testing.
Full Xcode is not installed yet; the current prototype builds with Command Line Tools.
